creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
While building the port net/frr7:

...
===>   frr7-7.5.1_1 depends on shared library: libyang.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libyang.so)
...
checking for LIBYANG (libyang >= 1.0.184)... no
configure: error: libyang (>= 1.0.184) was not found on your system.

Please specify required version of libyang in frr7's port Makefile.
